name: Zum Silbersack
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated January 2026, recent Untappd check-ins from September 2025. Open Mon-Sun 15:00-03:00. No closure reports found.

name: Zum Goldenen Handschuh
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated February 2026. Open 22 hours a day (closed only 16:00-18:00 for cleaning). Operated by Joern Nuernberg, grandson of founder.

name: Elbschlosskeller
evidence: Active website at elbschlosskeller.de. Only temporarily closed Feb 10-12, 2026 for refrigeration renovation. Otherwise operating normally.

name: Erika's Eck
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated February 2026, available on Wolt delivery. Operating with regular hours at Sternstrasse 98.

name: Zwick Poeseldorf
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated March 2026. Open daily from 11:30 at Mittelweg 121b. Website zwick4u.com active.

name: Die Glocke
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated March 2026. Operating with regular hours at Klosterallee 65. No closure reports found.

name: Schramme 10
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated March 2026, Instagram active. Operating Mon-Thu 15:00-02:00, Fri 15:00-04:00, Sat 12:00-04:00, Sun 12:00-02:00. hamburg.de listing shows 'geschlossen' but this appears to refer to current-moment status, not permanent closure.

name: Fricke 46
evidence: Active website fricke46.de. Open daily from 12:00. Rated 4.2/5 on Restaurant Guru. No closure reports found.

name: Schroeders
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated December 2025, Facebook page active. Operating Mon-Fri 16:00-03:00, Sat 15:00-03:00, Sun 16:00-03:00. Note: actual address is Hegestrasse 1, not Eppendorfer Weg 198 as listed in DB.

name: Paola's
evidence: Active listing on multiple sources including Cornelia Poletto's website. Open Tue-Fri 15:00-00:00, Sat 12:00-01:00. Closed Mon/Sun. Located at Goernestrasse 1a.

name: Frau Moeller
evidence: Active website fraumoeller.com and Yelp listing updated March 2026. Open Mon-Thu 08:00-03:00, Fri-Sat 08:00-04:00, Sun 08:00-02:00.

name: Familien-Eck
evidence: Active website familieneck.de and Yelp listing updated March 2026. Open daily from 16:00. Facebook post from December 2025 confirms open on holidays. Address listed as Friedensallee 2-4.

name: Ratsherrn Klause
evidence: Active website ratsherrnklause.de. Operating since 1957 at Schroederstiftstrasse 9. Regular hours listed, recent private event booking for Feb 2026 confirms active operation.

name: Holsten-Schwemme
evidence: Active listing on 11880.com updated March 2026. Open Mon-Sun 08:00-24:00 at Herrenweide 2a. Operating since 1969. Note: DB lists Seilerstrasse but actual address is Herrenweide 2a.

name: Hong-Kong Hotel Bar
evidence: Active website hotel-bar-hongkong.de. Yelp listing updated March 2026. Open 24/7. Located on Hamburger Berg (not Schmuckstrasse 9 as in DB).

name: Old Sailor
evidence: TripAdvisor listing for 2026 shows 'Open now'. Located at Hein-Hoyer-Strasse 4. Operating with regular hours. No closure reports found.

name: Zur Scharfen Ecke
evidence: Active Yelp listing updated March 2026 and website zur-scharfen-ecke.com. Open Mon-Sun 16:00-03:00. Operating since 1911 at Davidstrasse 3.

name: Haifisch Bar
evidence: Active website haifischbar.hamburg. Yelp listing updated January 2026. Open Mon-Fri 11:00-04:00, varied weekend hours. Operating since 1947 at Grosse Elbstrasse 128.

name: Lehmitz
evidence: Permanently closed as of December 27, 2025. Closure announced October 2025 via social media. t-online.de article confirms: 'Kiez-Kneipe Lehmitz auf der Reeperbahn gibt Betrieb auf'. Operated for 20 years before closing.

name: Hatari Pfaelzer Stube
evidence: Active website hataripfaelzerstube.com. Yelp listing updated February 2026. Open daily 12:00-00:00. Located at Eidelstedter Weg 1.
